steps.title: Convert pesos to US dollars using the exchange rate
steps.content:
Multiply 7,500 pesos by the conversion factor of 0.075 USD per peso:
$$7,500 \times 0.075 = 562.50 \text{ USD}$$

steps.title: Apply the 2% fee to the converted amount
steps.content:
Marta loses 2% to the exchange service, so she receives 98% of the converted dollars:
$$562.50 \times 0.98 = 551.25 \text{ USD}$$
A is correct.
